prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次约2169→1950→1780→1578→1478，呈持续前移趋势，近5年累计前移约691名，2025年基准约1478名；本省理 科计划2021年57人、2022年57人、2023年58人、2024年56人、2025年54人；2026年计划62人，较2025年扩招约14.8%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及生命科学 学院院长论文造假等学术不端事件，抖音热度排名第36（较热）。负面舆情可能使部分考生报考趋于谨慎，但南开大学整体品牌影响力仍强；第五轮学科评估A- 及以上14个：化学A+、数学A+、工商管理A+、应用经济学A+、统计学A、物理学A、生物学A、理论经济学A、中国语言文学A、世界史A、中国史A、政治学A、马克思主义理论A、环 境科学与工程A-。理科招生专业多对应数学、化学、物理、应用经济学等王牌学科，吸引力强；985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第21名，近年排名稳定在前20-25区间，属全国顶尖综合类大学。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推 荐，与南开大学理科试验班（数学与大数据、物理与光电）、工科试验班（信息科学与技术）等招生大类高度关联；本省2026年高考总人数约218700人，较2025年（约179817人） 增长约21.6%，考生大幅增加加剧竞争；南开大学位于天津，属跨省报考；该校在甘肃招生规模较小（2025年理科54人） ，招生占比约0.7%，地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年计划扩招约14.8%缓解竞争、本省考生大增约21.6%加剧竞争、负面声誉可能 抑制部分报考热情、优势学科与热门专业持续吸引高分考生等多因素，扩招与考生大增相互对冲，但历史前移趋势和热门专业吸引力更强，预计在2025年基准1478名基础上竞争略 有加剧；预测最低位次约1579名，区间1399–1759名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 2169 → 1950 → 1780 → 1578 → 1478, showing a continuous forward trend, with a cumulative forward shift of about 691 positions over the past 5 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 1478. The provincial science enrollment plan was 57 in 2021, 57 in 2022, 58 in 2023, 56 in 2024, and 54 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 62 students, an increase of about 14.8% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and may alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents such as the dean of the School of Life Sciences fabricating papers. Douyin popularity ranking is 36th (relatively hot). Negative public opinion may make some candidates more cautious in applying, but Nankai University's overall brand influence remains strong. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 14 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemistry A+, Mathematics A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Statistics A, Physics A, Biology A, Theoretical Economics A, Chinese Language and Literature A, World History A, Chinese History A, Political Science A, Marxist Theory A, Environmental Science and Engineering A-. The science enrollment majors mostly correspond to top disciplines such as Mathematics, Chemistry, Physics, and Applied Economics, which are highly attractive. It is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. According to the Soft Science main ranking in 2026, it is approximately 21st, with stable rankings in the top 20-25 range in recent years, making it a top-tier comprehensive university nationwide.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, closely related to Nankai University's enrollment categories like Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data, Physics and Optoelectronics) and Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology). The total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (approximately 179,817), significantly intensifying competition. Nankai University is located in Tianjin, which is a cross-province application. The university's enrollment scale in Gansu is relatively small (54 science students in 2025), accounting for about 0.7% of enrollment, so regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 14.8% alleviating competition, the significant increase of about 21.6% in provincial candidates intensifying competition, negative reputation possibly suppressing some application enthusiasm, and advantageous disciplines and popular majors continuing to attract high-scoring candidates, the expansion and the increase in candidates offset each other. However, the historical forward trend and the appeal of popular majors are stronger, so competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 1478. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1579, with a range of 1399–1759.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1400), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 top majors.
